chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. Sales Tax Reference Application 181 of 2018 Spl. Sales Tax Reference Application 185 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1811/2018 2. For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 Mr. Pervez Iqbal Kazi, advocate for the respondent. These reference applications are pending since 2018 without any significant progress. Learned counsel for the respondent points out that seven years have lapsed since these reference applications were filed and even these reference applications are time barred as may be seen from respective applications. Be that as it may, the applicant remains unrepresented and it appears that the Commissioner Inland Revenue Zone V, Karachi is not interested in pursuing these matters, which are accordingly dismissed in non- prosecution along with pending application/s. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge M. Khan
